testcase.name: testRegisterWithWeakPassword

failure.message: BUG: No password strength validation! Weak password '123' was accepted. Account was created.

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: BUG: No password strength validation! Weak password '123' was accepted. Account was created. at Tests.BonusTests.testRegisterWithWeakPassword(BonusTests.java:114) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) ... Removed 30 stack frames

failure.message: BUG: Product added with zero quantity! manual typing bypasses validation.

failure.message: BUG: Empty search returned 34 products! Should have returned 0 results.

failure.message: Account not created! expected [true] but found [false]
